title: XICHEN® 12 x Dinosaur Egg Cute Magic Growing Dinosaur Egg Add Water Child Gift Hatching Inflatable Toy (Red, yellow, blue, green)
features: Perfect Gift for your child. Each Lest dragon egg comes with detailed instructions for use.
Just put the egg in a Bowl of water(Water temperature below 36 degrees) and watch it hatch out of its egg and grow!
Takes 12-24 hours for the dino to break thru the shell.(Don't forget to add water)After that the dino can grow even more!
Baby Size: 5cm * 7cm。 4 different colors of the shell. 12 dinosaur eggs.
About 9 different dinosaur species. There are 3-4 models of dinosaurs will be repeated.

Directions Place the egg in a bowl of water (water temperature below 36 degrees) and watch it come out of its egg and grow. It takes 12-24 hours for the dinosaur to break through the shell. (Don't forget to add water). After that, the dinosaur can grow even more. Baby Size: 5 x 7 cm. 4 different colours of the case. 12 x Dinosaur Eggs About 9 different species of dinosaurs. There are 3-4 dinosaur models that will be repeated. Each Lest Dragon Egg comes with detailed instructions for use. Perfect gift for your child.
